children.heading: Conservation, coral, coral reef, etc.
children.label: 2 Conservation, coral, coral reef, etc.
children.text: The terms “conservation”, “coral”, “coral reef”, “coral reef ecosystem”, “covered reef manager”, “covered State”, “Federal reef manager”, “National Coral Reef Resilience Strategy”, “restoration”, “resilience”, and “State” have the meanings given those terms in , as added by this division.section 6415 of this title
